narrative:
11 Ohio Senate district has 217,746 registered voters, with 62.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 10.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.2%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 16.5 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +12.3% D−R vs +27.7% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
